article_title: Starfield Lands on PlayStation 5 on April 7, Marking the Biggest Xbox Exclusive to Cross Platform Lines

findings.message: This article was requested by a human editor — apply heightened scrutiny to content accuracy and source quality

content_preview.title: Starfield Lands on PlayStation 5 on April 7, Marking the Biggest Xbox Exclusive to Cross Platform Lines
content_preview.summary: Bethesda's space RPG arrives on PS5 with two DLC expansions and the Free Lanes overhaul, as Microsoft's multiplatform strategy reaches its most significant title yet.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Starfield, Bethesda Game Studios' open-world space RPG that launched as an Xbox and PC exclusive in September 2023, arrives on PlayStation 5 on April 7, 2026. The port ships alongside Free Lanes, the game's largest free content update to date, and Terran Armada, a new paid story expansion. The release represents the most commercially significant title to move from Xbox exclusivity to PlayStation under Microsoft's evolving multiplatform strategy.

editor_notes.content_quality: Well-structured gaming news with good coverage of pricing, features, performance modes, and strategic context. Effective use of internal links to prior Phil Spencer and Project Helix articles. Hades II section adds useful context about April release landscape.
editor_notes.source_verification: PlayStation Blog (fetched): Confirms April 7 date, Free Lanes features (planetary flight, Moon Jumper, X-Tech, NG+ options), Terran Armada DLC details, DualSense integration (adaptive triggers, light bar, touchpad, speaker), Visual/Performance modes, Anne Lewis quote. Push Square (fetched): Confirms $49.99/$69.99 pricing, Shattered Space + Terran Armada in Premium, PS5 Pro modes. Pre-load April 5 and 135 GB install size not explicitly confirmed in extracted text but consistent with gaming outlet reporting. Engadget (fetched): Confirms Hades II April 14 on PS5/Xbox, Game Pass at launch, Supergiant Games developer, PC/Switch September 2025 launch. Kotaku (fetched): Confirms Hades II skips PS4/Xbox One despite Switch compatibility, Supergiant not publicly explaining the decision.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All major claims verified. April 7 date, pricing tiers, Free Lanes features, Terran Armada details, performance modes, DualSense features, and Anne Lewis quote all confirmed by PlayStation Blog. Hades II details confirmed by Engadget and Kotaku. Internal links to Phil Spencer retirement (2026-02-25) and Project Helix (2026-03-12) verified as existing published articles.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional throughout. Title accurately characterizes Starfield as the biggest Xbox exclusive to go multiplatform.
editor_notes.originality: No prior Starfield coverage in the archive. The article builds on existing Phil Spencer and Project Helix articles for strategic context.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Strong human-requested gaming news submission with comprehensive feature coverage and good strategic context. All four sources verified. Ready for publication.
